# zendesk_group_membership (Data Source)

Look up an existing Zendesk group membership by ID, or by the (user_id, group_id) pair.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `group_id` (Number) The ID of the group.
- `id` (String) The ID of the group membership. Provide either id, or the (user_id, group_id) pair.
- `user_id` (Number) The ID of the user.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `default` (Boolean)
- `updated_at` (String)
